Name: MRT_PROJECT
Sourced from: The Project Id (not name) in the Managed Runtime

Name: MRT_TARGET
Sourced from: Business Manager post scaffolding or Managed Runtime

Name: MRT_deploymentUrl
Sourced from: Business Manager post scaffolding in Administration → Sites → Storefronts → MarketStreet → Environments → eCDN → Expand Routing Rule

Name: B2C_SLAS_clientId
Sourced from: .csv file from Option A or SLAS Admin tool

Name: B2C_SLAS_SECRET
Sourced from: .csv file from Option A or SLAS Admin tool - must be collected on creation if using SLAS Admin

Name: B2C_siteId
Sourced from: Business Manager → Administration → Sites → Manage Sites

Name: B2C_organizationId
Sourced from: Business Manager: Administration → Site Development → Salesforce Commerce API Settings

Name: B2C_shortCode
Sourced from: Business Manager: Administration → Site Development → Salesforce Commerce API Settings

Name: B2C_hostname
Sourced from: The initial part of your sandbox URL between the protocol and path is the hostname.

Name: B2C_realm
Sourced from: The initial part of your sandbox URL between the protocol and the first dash (-) before the first dot (.) in the hostname.

Name: B2C_instance
Sourced from: The initial part of your sandbox URL between the protocol and after the first dash (-) before the first dot (.) in the hostname. In sandboxes. Typically numeric.

Name: B2C_subdomain
Sourced from: The initial part of your B2C hostname before the first dot (.)

Name: B2C_defaultSiteId
Sourced from: Business Manager: Site ID value for the one scaffolded as a storefront

Name: ORG_username
Sourced from: Verify Your Account Email from support. This looks like an email address, but it isn’t although there’s an email backing it.

Name: ORG_Id
Sourced from: Setup → Company Information or Workshop Email with subject: Salesforce Org Environment Details

Name: ORG_serviceChannelId
Sourced from: Query Salesforce org via script (upcoming activity)

Name: ORG_queueId
Sourced from: Query Salesforce org via script (upcoming activity)

Name: ORG_copilotId
Sourced from: Query Salesforce org via script (upcoming activity)
